mainEntity.name: How long does it take to get a intangible asset valuation india report?

acceptedAnswer.text: Typically 5-15 working days from receipt of complete documents and information. Rush delivery available within 3-5 working days for urgent transactions. Contact us at +91-99622 60333 for timeline confirmation.

mainEntity.name: What is the cost of intangible asset valuation india?

acceptedAnswer.text: Fees depend on the complexity, number of frameworks, and entity size. We offer transparent fixed-fee pricing communicated upfront. Contact Virtual Auditor for a customised quote — initial consultation is free.

mainEntity.name: Is an IBBI registered valuer mandatory for intangible asset valuation?

acceptedAnswer.text: For valuations under the Companies Act (Section 247), IBC, and certain SEBI regulations, an IBBI registered valuer is mandatory. For FEMA and income tax valuations, a CA certificate suffices but an IBBI-registered report provides stronger regulatory protection. CA V. Viswanathan holds IBBI registration IBBI/RV/03/2019/12333.
